name: Ubiquiti UniFi G3 Touch Pro
title: Ubiquiti UniFi G3 Touch Pro
short_description: Cutting-edge desktop VoIP phone with a 5-inch HD multi-touch display, 5 MP camera, dual Gigabit Ethernet ports, and WiFi 5 connectivity.
description: The UniFi G3 Touch Pro offers a cutting-edge VoIP experience for modern enterprises. Featuring a vibrant 5-inch HD multi-touch display with 720×1280 resolution and anti-glare coating, it ensures sharp visuals and effortless navigation even under challenging lighting. Its sophisticated design combines a durable polycarbonate body with an aluminum alloy stand, delivering both style and robustness for professional desktops. Integrated with UniFi Talk and Talk Relay, it supports seamless interaction with UniFi’s VoIP ecosystem while remaining compatible with third-party PBX platforms. A built-in 5 MP camera with a privacy shutter elevates video conferencing security, making it ideal for environments where confidentiality matters. The intuitive touch interface simplifies call management, and customizable features cater to demanding workflows in offices, meeting rooms, and reception areas. This phone combines advanced communication features with enterprise-grade quality and sleek aesthetics.

detailed_description.heading: Advanced Desktop VoIP Solution
detailed_description.text: The UniFi G3 Touch Pro offers a cutting-edge VoIP experience for modern enterprises. Featuring a vibrant 5-inch HD multi-touch display with 720×1280 resolution and anti-glare coating, it ensures sharp visuals and effortless navigation even under challenging lighting. Its sophisticated design combines a durable polycarbonate body with an aluminum alloy stand, delivering both style and robustness for professional desktops. Integrated with UniFi Talk and Talk Relay, it supports seamless interaction with UniFi’s VoIP ecosystem while remaining compatible with third-party PBX platforms. A built-in 5 MP camera with a privacy shutter elevates video conferencing security, making it ideal for environments where confidentiality matters. The intuitive touch interface simplifies call management, and customizable features cater to demanding workflows in offices, meeting rooms, and reception areas. This phone combines advanced communication features with enterprise-grade quality and sleek aesthetics.

detailed_description.heading: Seamless Connectivity & Superior Audio
detailed_description.text: Designed for optimal connectivity, the G3 Touch Pro includes dual Gigabit Ethernet ports, enabling flexible wired deployments, and supports PoE (Power over Ethernet) for a cleaner desk setup. Its wireless capabilities feature dual-band Wi-Fi 5 (802.11ac) and Bluetooth 4.2, with added support for Bluetooth 5.2 to pair with the optional G3 Wireless Handset. An NFC reader further streamlines device pairing and access management. For audio, the phone integrates a high-fidelity 2 W speaker, dual omnidirectional MEMS microphones, and a handset with a wideband receiver and electret condenser microphone for crystal-clear voice communication. A 3.5 mm headset jack adds compatibility with professional wired headsets. The device can be powered via PoE, consuming a maximum of 10 W for energy efficiency, ideal for enterprise deployments where reliability is critical.

detailed_description.heading: High Performance and Reliability
detailed_description.text: Built for demanding business environments, the G3 Touch Pro is powered by an octa-core ARM Cortex-A53 processor, ensuring smooth operation of VoIP functions, apps, and multitasking. It features 2 GB RAM and 32 GB internal flash storage to handle call logs, firmware updates, and applications seamlessly. Designed to operate within a 0–40 °C temperature range and up to 90% non-condensing humidity, it guarantees dependable performance in offices and commercial installations. The customizable R/G/B/W LED indicator provides visual status updates for incoming calls, messages, and device health at a glance. With certifications like FCC, IC, and CE, and NDAA compliance, the G3 Touch Pro meets strict security and regulatory standards required for enterprise networks. Its robust hardware, advanced software capabilities, and secure communication features make it a smart investment for professional-grade VoIP systems.
